title: ODS-E Spare Parts
description: Spare part inventory record including stock levels, reorder thresholds, and equipment applicability

part_id.description: Unique spare part identifier from the ERP/EAM inventory system

equipment_types_served.description: List of equipment types this part is applicable to

qty_reserved.description: Quantity reserved for open work orders

qty_available.description: Quantity available for new work orders (on_hand minus reserved)

reorder_point.description: Stock level at which a purchase requisition should be triggered

supplier_lead_time_days.description: Typical supplier lead time in calendar days

last_unit_cost.description: Unit cost from the most recent purchase order
